message: Here's the Python code to analyze the SST warming trend:
code:
import oceanum.datamesh
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import pandas as pd

# Connect to Datamesh
datamesh = oceanum.datamesh.Connector()

# Load SST dataset
sst = datamesh.load_datasource('sst-global-daily')

# Query for the western Pacific region
sst_wp = sst.query(
    timefilter={'times': ['2020-01-01', '2023-12-31']},
    geofilter={'type': 'BoundingBox', 'coordinates': [140, -10, 180, 10]}
)

# Calculate monthly means
monthly_mean = sst_wp.resample(time='M').mean()

# Plot warming trend
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
plt.plot(monthly_mean.time, monthly_mean.sst)
plt.xlabel('Date')
plt.ylabel('SST (°C)')
plt.title('Western Pacific SST Warming Trend 2020-2023')
plt.grid(True)
plt.show()
